scope: Integrated route-backed live Book ladder staged price and Buy/Sell ticket handoff
eventIdentity: EL-A Provider Breadth World Cup Live

assertions.baseline: Book opens on Breadth Home winner with staged-level-none and visible ask/bid ladder rows.
assertions.askStage: Tapping order-book-ask-level-e373c663-b58c-4d57-aae1-8f5cd136d44f-1 stages Buy ask at 0.55 USDT / 55c for 150 shares.
assertions.askTicket: Staged open-ticket launches a Buy ticket; after tapping +$10 it shows ticket-price-line 55c, To win, and Swipe up to buy.
assertions.bidStage: Tapping order-book-bid-level-e373c663-b58c-4d57-aae1-8f5cd136d44f-1 stages Sell bid at 0.50 USDT / 50c for 180 shares.
assertions.bidTicket: Staged open-ticket launches a Sell ticket; after tapping +$10 it shows ticket-price-line 50c and Swipe up to sell.
assertions.contractShape: The proof uses route-backed provider orderbook depth from the integrated backend event.

remainingGaps: The staged ladder handoff is local mobile UI behavior; server order submission still consumes the existing ticket/order service contract.
Real provider-backed live depth breadth remains dependent on backend/provider coverage outside this Agent B UI-owned change.
